response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack developer with strong web/backend credentials in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure or distributed systems at cloud-compute scale. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no production cloud-compute platform leadership experience. Core minimum qualifications are not met.
strengths: Long track record of senior engineering roles with mentoring, workshops, and technical leadership signals
Distributed/high-throughput experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/second
Founder of an open source platform deployed on Kubernetes, showing architecture ownership
concerns: Does not meet 8-year C++ requirement — only brief C/C++ work at National Instruments
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or production cloud architecture experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
